top_signals.title: Marvell Technology and Flex to join S&P 500 index, replacing Pool and Campbell's
top_signals.summary: The move highlights the growing importance of the technology sector to the stock market.

top_signals.title: Starmer scrambles to make savings in bid to boost defence spending
top_signals.summary: Keir Starmer is planning on making cuts across the government in a bid to fund his long awaited Defence Investment Plan. The prime minister will make targeted slashes to transport and net zero spending by 1 per cent in a bid to raise approximately £6bn for defence costs by the end of this parliament. Starmer [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ’Cockroach’ youth group founder leads first street protest after arrival in India
top_signals.summary: The ⁠group is the largest online expression of dissent against Narendra Modi's 12-year rule, fueled by ​persistently high youth unemployment.
